name: Teriyaki Steak
recipeInstructions:
1. In a gallon-size zipper bag, mix all ingredients except the steak.
- Do not use regular soy sauce; otherwise, the marinade will be too salty.
2. Add the steaks to the bag and seal it.
3. Refrigerate for 24 hours, turning occasionally.
4. Grill or broil the steaks until cooked to your desired doneness.
5. Serve with the remaining burgundy wine.
